formulas.name: 1. Denudation Process
formulas.variables: Denudation refers to the wearing away of the Earth's surface
formulas.notes: Denudation involves weathering, erosion, and deposition

formulas.name: 2. Weathering Types
formulas.variables: Types of weathering: mechanical, chemical, and biological
formulas.notes: Understanding the different types of weathering is crucial for landform evolution

formulas.name: 3. Erosion by Running Water
formulas.variables: Erosion by running water involves the removal of rock and soil
formulas.notes: Erosion by running water leads to the formation of various landforms

formulas.name: 4. River Longitudinal Profile
formulas.variables: River longitudinal profile shows the river's course from source to mouth
formulas.notes: Understanding the river's longitudinal profile helps in identifying landforms

formulas.name: 5. Delta Formation
formulas.variables: Delta formation occurs when a river deposits sediment at its mouth
formulas.notes: Deltas are formed through the deposition of sediment by rivers

formulas.name: 6. Marine Erosion
formulas.variables: Marine erosion involves the wearing away of the coast by the sea
formulas.notes: Marine erosion leads to the formation of various coastal landforms

formulas.name: 7. Glacial Erosion
formulas.variables: Glacial erosion involves the removal of rock and soil by glaciers
formulas.notes: Glacial erosion leads to the formation of unique landforms such as U-shaped valleys

formulas.name: 8. Karst Topography
formulas.variables: Karst topography involves the dissolution of limestone rocks
formulas.notes: Karst topography leads to the formation of unique landforms such as caves and sinkholes

formulas.name: 9. Volcanic Landforms
formulas.variables: Volcanic landforms are formed through volcanic activity
formulas.notes: Volcanic landforms include volcanoes, lava flows, and volcanic ash deposits

formulas.name: 10. Plate Tectonics
formulas.variables: Plate tectonics involves the movement of the Earth's lithosphere
formulas.notes: Plate tectonics plays a crucial role in shaping the Earth's surface and forming landforms
